title: AUTOMAGIC
description: Automagic adds magic spells, machines, and gadgets to the game. Designed to enhance faction/nation PVP servers
body:
**Automagic** adds magic spells, machines, and gadgets to the game. Designed to enhance faction/nation PVP servers, it introduces all types of spells with spell-crafting mechanics. This plugin also adds custom machines for automation, allowing players to craft better items, compete for resources, and have fun. The new features will not replace standard weapons like swords and bows but will be used alongside them to expand on the existing combat system.

**Downloading the** [Resourcepack](https://www.mediafire.com/file/zofd0m56ww10m5x/AutomagicTextures.zip/file) is required for the best experience.

Additionally, an **in-game guidebook** is available for every item & mechanic The guide should be given automatically but if not, do **/get_item guidebook** and every item in the plugin can be get in **/get_item** 

Everything in this plugin is a work in progress, everything will be changed/polished as we push out updates. Feel free to contact **petepoo** for suggestions/bug reporting


![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/euYsUEw.gif)
